title: shims.c has stale comment claiming Ed25519 needs no shim
description: shims.c lines 6-8 say 'Ed25519 does NOT need a shim: ed25519_key is a concrete 256-byte type in wolfcrypt-rs, so Rust can allocate it directly.' But lines 335-377 define wolfhsm_ed25519_{make_key,sign,verify} shims. A future contributor reading only the comment will attempt to remove the shims, breaking the build. Fix: delete or rewrite the stale comment to say Ed25519 DOES use a shim because wolfhsm-sys bindgen only allows wh.* types.
